components.parameter_set: SHA-256 with a 256-bit digest and specification-defined length/domain framing
purposes: Derive ResourceId from canonical ResourceWireV1 bytes with exact length framing.
Derive transparent-profile nullifiers from machine, domain, and resource identity.
claimed_properties: The reference implementation is deterministic over explicitly supplied bytes.
Every implemented protocol use supplies an explicit ASCII domain and fixed-width length framing.
Independent fixed vectors constrain the current suite, resource-ID, and transparent-nullifier outputs.
non_claims: SHA-256 hashing does not authenticate caller-provided resource or policy data by itself.
The transparent nullifier profile provides no privacy.
The current implementation provides no signature, proof system, key management, confidentiality, or hardware-backed claim.
Miri and local vectors do not establish the soundness of every dependency unsafe or architecture-specific path.
